governance.permitted_use: Research and benchmarking; private use only.
governance.redistribution_rights: Official ECOSTRESS page requests citation and states copyright/all rights reserved; converted matrices are private/internal until redistribution rights are clarified.

diagnostics.interpretation: Effet systématique du support, blanc/noir, transflectance ou environnement de mesure.
diagnostics.label: Fond différent

diagnostics.interpretation: Variété, espèce, lot ou condition différente mais physiquement plausible.
diagnostics.label: Spectre hors domaine valide

diagnostics.interpretation: Décalage systématique entre campagnes, instruments ou référence blanche.
diagnostics.label: Erreur calibration / référence blanche

diagnostics.interpretation: Couverture partielle du spot; contribution du fond ou du support.
diagnostics.label: Mélange feuille + fond

diagnostics.interpretation: Mélange de campagnes, opérateurs, lots, setups ou sous-populations spectrales.
diagnostics.label: Dataset multi-régimes

diagnostics.interpretation: Modification de l'illumination, collecte, angle ou distance sonde-échantillon.
diagnostics.label: Différence de sonde / géométrie

diagnostics.interpretation: Combinaison possible changement de sonde + splice, amplifiée par géométrie, fond ou calibration.
diagnostics.label: Signature VERA25-like

diagnostics.interpretation: Rupture aux jonctions de détecteurs, calibration locale ou sonde différente.
diagnostics.label: Splice / raccord détecteurs

top_classes.name: Apollo 16 landing site via the NASA Lunar Sample Repository at JohnsonSpace Center, Houston, TX.
Apollo 12 landing site via the NASA Lunar Sample Repository at JohnsonSpace Center, Houston, TX.
Apollo 14 landing site via the NASA Lunar Sample Repository at JohnsonSpace Center, Houston, TX.
Apollo 11 landing site via the NASA Lunar Sample Repository at JohnsonSpace Center, Houston, TX.

This sample is one of a suite of relatively more aluminous and lower iron and titanium soils at the Apollo 16 site, and has the second oldest exposure age of the four soils of that suite (Is/FeO=57). Original ASTER Spectral Library name was jhu.becknic.soil.lunar.highlands.fine.60051.spectrum.txt

This sample is one of a suite of relatively more aluminous and lower iron and titanium soils at the Apollo 16 site, and has the lowest exposure age of the four soils of that suite (Is/FeO=10). Original ASTER Spectral Library name was jhu.becknic.soil.lunar.highlands.fine.61221.spectrum.txt

This sample is one of a suite of relatively less aluminous soils at the Apollo 16 site, and has an intermediate exposure age of the three soils of that suite (Is/FeO=47). Original ASTER Spectral Library name was jhu.becknic.soil.lunar.highlands.fine.61242.spectrum.txt

Chemistry is not available for this extra sample, but it appears to be one of the relatively less aluminous soils at the Apollo 16 site from its spectrum (i.e., it resembles suite 16b samples, such as 67941, 61241, and 68501), but has a very great exposure age (Is/FeO=91). Original ASTER Spectral Library name was jhu.becknic.soil.lunar.highlands.fine.62231.spectrum.txt

This sample is one of a suite of relatively more aluminous soils at the Apollo 16 site, and has the oldest exposure age of the four soils of that suite (Is/FeO=78). Original ASTER Spectral Library name was jhu.becknic.soil.lunar.highlands.fine.64801.spectrum.txt

This sample is one of a suite of relatively more aluminous and lower iron and titanium soils at the Apollo 16 site, and has an intermediate exposure age of the four soils of that suite (Is/FeO=37). Original ASTER Spectral Library name was jhu.becknic.soil.lunar.highlands.fine.67701.spectrum.txt

This sample is one of a suite of relatively less aluminous soils at the Apollo 16 site, and has the least exposure age of the three soils of that suite (Is/FeO=29). Original ASTER Spectral Library name was jhu.becknic.soil.lunar.highlands.fine.67941.spectrum.txt

This sample is one of a suite of relatively less aluminous soils at the Apollo 16 site, and has the oldest exposure age of the three soils of that suite (Is/FeO=85). Original ASTER Spectral Library name was jhu.becknic.soil.lunar.highlands.fine.68501.spectrum.txt
This is the only sample from the Apollo 11 mare site. This sample has a large exposure age (Is/FeO=78). Original ASTER Spectral Library name was jhu.becknic.soil.lunar.maria.fine.10084.spectrum.txt

This sample is one of a suite of soils of similar chemistry, but different exposure ages, from the Apollo 12 mare site. This sample has the greatest exposure age of the three soils of that suite (Is/FeO=60). Original ASTER Spectral Library name was jhu.becknic.soil.lunar.maria.fine.12023.spectrum.txt

This sample is one of a suite of soils of similar chemistry, but different exposure ages, from the Apollo 12 mare site. This sample has the intermediate exposure age of the three soils of that suite (Is/FeO=30). Original ASTER Spectral Library name was jhu.becknic.soil.lunar.maria.fine.12024.spectrum.txt

This sample is one of a suite of soils of similar chemistry, but different exposure ages, from the Apollo 12 mare site. This sample has the lowest exposure age of the three soils of that suite (Is/FeO=14). Original ASTER Spectral Library name was jhu.becknic.soil.lunar.maria.fine.12030.spectrum.txt

This is an extra sample from the Apollo 12 mare site. This sample has an intermediate exposure age compared to the other three soils from the Apollo 12 site (Is/FeO=47). Original ASTER Spectral Library name was jhu.becknic.soil.lunar.maria.fine.12070.spectrum.txt

This sample is one of a suite of soils at the Apollo 14 site representing major element chemistry transitional between the highlands and maria. It has the least exposure age of the three soils of that suite ((Is/FeO=6). Original ASTER Spectral Library name was jhu.becknic.soil.lunar.transitional.fine.14141.spectrum.txt

This sample is one of a suite of soils at the Apollo 14 site representing major element chemistry transitional between the highlands and maria. It has the greatest exposure age of the three soils of that suite (Is/FeO=74). Original ASTER Spectral Library name was jhu.becknic.soil.lunar.transitional.fine.14148.spectrum.txt

This sample is one of a suite of soils at the Apollo 14 site representing major element chemistry transitional between the highlands and maria. It has an intermediate exposure age of the three soils of that suite (Is/FeO=53). Original ASTER Spectral Library name was jhu.becknic.soil.lunar.transitional.fine.14149.spectrum.txt

The Apollo 14 site represents major element chemistry transitional between the highlands and maria. This sample is an additional sample to the suite of soils from this site selected to represent different exposure ages of the same basic soil. The exposure age of this soil is very great (Is/FeO=85). Original ASTER Spectral Library name was jhu.becknic.soil.lunar.transitional.fine.14259.spectrum.txt
Meerdink et al. 2019, Baldridge et al. 2009
